name: Siebel Systems, Inc.
description: Siebel Systems, Inc. was a prominent American software company founded in 1993 by Thomas M. Siebel and Patricia House. The company specialized in customer relationship management (CRM), enterprise resource planning (ERP), and supply chain management software. Headquartered in San Mateo, California, Siebel Systems became a market leader in CRM solutions before being acquired by Oracle Corporation in 2006. Following the acquisition, Siebel's product line was integrated into Oracle's extensive enterprise software portfolio, continuing to serve large organizations globally with advanced sales, marketing, and service automation tools.
